allow: Bash(powershell -c "Get-Process -Name postgres* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_LocalPort -gt 5000 -and $_LocalPort -lt 6000} | Select LocalPort,OwningProcess")

Bash(powershell -c "Get-Process -Name postgres* 2>$null | Select-Object Id,Name; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen 2>$null | Where-Object LocalPort -gt 5400 | Where-Object LocalPort -lt 5500 | Select LocalPort")

Bash(powershell -Command "& { $p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3334 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Host ''killed'' } else { Write-Host ''not found'' } }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Service ''postgresql-x64-15'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Service ''postgresql-x64-16'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Service ''postgresql-x64-17'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ''Tentativa concluída''")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3334/api/setup/primeiro-acesso" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""empresa"":{""nome_fantasia"":""Imobiliaria Teste CPF"",""razao_social"":""Imobiliaria Teste CPF ME"",""cnpj"":""053.477.823-23"",""telefone"":""\(11\) 99999-0001"",""cidade"":""Sao Paulo"",""estado"":""SP""},""usuario"":{""login"":""usuario_teste_cpf"",""senha"":""teste123"",""email"":""cpfteste@sislote.com"",""telefone"":""\(11\) 99999-0001""},""planCode"":""TESTE""}")

Bash(psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U sislote -d sislote -c "SELECT id_empresa, nome_fantasia, cnpj, plano, hub_license_status, hub_expires_at::text, hub_customer_id FROM empresa WHERE regexp_replace\(COALESCE\(cnpj, ''\), '[^0-9]', '', 'g'\) = '48756385072';")
Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Service | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -match '\\''postgres|sql'\\'' } | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status')
Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Service | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status | Where-Object { $_.Status -eq '\\''Stopped'\\'' }')

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) items = data.get\('data', data\) if isinstance\(data, dict\) else data print\(f'Total parcelas: {len\(items\)}'\) for p in items[:3]: print\(f' id={p[\\"id_pagamento\\"]} parcela={p[\\"numero_parcela\\"]} venc={p[\\"vencimento\\"]} valor={p[\\"valor\\"]} sit={p[\\"situacao\\"]}'\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json try: d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)[:500]\) except: print\(sys.stdin.read\(\)[:500]\) ")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; items=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pagas=[p for p in items if p['situacao']=='pago']; print\(f' Pagas: {len\(pagas\)} | Abertas: {len\(items\)-len\(pagas\)}'\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) if isinstance\(d, list\): print\(f'Total: {len\(d\)}'\) for l in d: print\(f' id={l[\\"id_loteamento\\"]} nome={l[\\"nome\\"]}'\) elif isinstance\(d, dict\): items = d.get\('data', []\) print\(f'Total: {d.get\(\\"total\\", len\(items\)\)}'\) for l in items: print\(f' id={l[\\"id_loteamento\\"]} nome={l[\\"nome\\"]}'\) " echo "" echo "-- Excluir clientes com dados inválidos dos testes --")
